evidences.content: Welcome back in this lesson 欢迎回来，在这节课中 let's talk about using Niagara effects to create impacts and explosions for your 让我们谈谈如何使用Niagara特效来制作冲击和爆炸效果 Now I've included this final shot so you can reference back to this and see 现在我包含了这个最后的镜头，这样你就可以参考并查看 exactly how it's built and how all of these pieces should fit together 它是如何构建的，以及所有这些部分应该如何组合在一起 You'll notice that it's really easy for us to scrub back and forth in 你会注意到我们可以很容易地来回切换 this timeline and our Niagara particle effects snap to the correct frame 这个时间轴上，我们的Niagara粒子效果会自动对齐到正确的帧 but this is not their default behavior 但这不是它们的默认行为 And a lot of times this can get people off track because you have to enable 而且很多时候这会让人迷失方向，因为你必须启用 some particular settings when you're adding Niagara particle effects into your 当你将Niagara粒子效果添加到你的场景中时，需要一些特定的设置 if you want to grab some of the effects presets 如果你想使用一些特效预设 just go to the saber battle and then effects folder 只需进入光剑战斗，然后选择特效文件夹 And for example 例如 let's grab this saber impact laser Niagara system and Niagara systems are 让我们选择这个光剑冲击激光Niagara系统，Niagara系统是 in this cyan color as of unreal 5.2. 在虚幻引擎5.2版本中是青色的。 And you'll see that this just starts looping live in our scene 你会看到它在我们的场景中开始循环播放 And it's kind of cool because it interacts and bounces around and it has 它很酷，因为它会与其他物体交互并弹跳，还有 proper physics with all of the objects in our scene 与我们场景中的所有物体有适当的物理交互 but we want to be able to lock this to a certain frame range in our scene 但我们想将其锁定在场景中的某个帧范围内 so that we'll get the same render result every single time to set this up 这样，我们每次渲染时都能得到相同的结果，为了设置这个 Let's add an impact and update the timing of our new particle system to 让我们添加一个冲击效果，并更新我们新粒子系统的时序到 match the impact of this saber slicing through the Vanguard 与光剑切过先锋的冲击效果相匹配 So first off 首先 let's get this in the right position 让我们将其放在正确的位置 So we'll grab the move tool and grab on the X and Y axis here until we get 我们使用移动工具，在这里沿着X和Y轴移动，直到我们得到 them close to our Vanguard warrior 它们靠近我们的先锋战士 And I'm just constantly toggling the icons on and off by pressing the G 我只需按下G键，不断切换图标的显示和隐藏 And a lot of times you can tell exactly where it is because the icons will 很多时候，你可以准确地知道它在哪里，因为图标会 intersect with geometry 与几何图形相交 that's lined up right around his back 它与他的背部对齐 And then we can also rotate it into the right direction 然后我们还可以将其旋转到正确的方向 Now let's scrub forward in our timeline to make sure that it's lined up 现在让我们在时间轴中向前切换，以确保它对齐 And now we can line it up slightly better here 现在我们可以稍微更好地对齐 And once we like that position 一旦我们喜欢这个位置 all we have to do is grab this Niagara particle system from our outliner and 我们只需要从大纲中获取这个Niagara粒子系统 just drag it into our sequencer timeline 然后将其拖放到我们的序列时间轴中 And now you can see that this saber impact laser three appears inside of 现在你可以看到这个光剑冲击激光三出现在 Now to add in properties and key frames 现在要添加属性和关键帧 we need to add in a track first 我们首先需要添加一个轨道 So a kind of confusing thing here 这里有一件令人困惑的事情 if you're just starting out is you would think that you could just add any 如果你刚刚开始，你可能会认为你可以添加任何 property from this particle system right away 立即从这个粒子系统中添加属性 but we actually have to add in this Niagara component 但实际上我们必须添加这个Niagara组件 And now when we add a track from the Niagara component 现在当我们从Niagara组件中添加一个轨道时 we have all of our different Niagara settings that we can key frame and 我们有各种不同的Niagara设置可以设置关键帧 animate inside of sequencer 在序列中进行动画 the one that's most important to us is going to be this Niagara system 对我们来说最重要的是这个Niagara系统 life cycle track 生命周期轨道 Now this life cycle will let us offset the timing of this particle system 现在这个生命周期轨道将使我们能够偏移这个粒子系统的时序 forwards and backwards 向前和向后 If we set it up the right way 如果我们正确设置 So just right click on a life cycle and then set the age update mode to 所以只需在生命周期上右键单击，然后将年龄更新模式设置为 desired age 所需的年龄 Now this is that one magic setting 现在这就是那个神奇的设置 And now I can drag this system life cycle back and forth and offset the 现在我可以来回拖动这个系统生命周期，偏移 frame range of my Niagara particle system 我的Niagara粒子系统的帧范围 This makes it really easy for us to step forward through sequencer 这样我们就可以很容易地在序列中向前进行步进 So I'm just going to press the left and right arrow keys to go back and 所以我只需按左右箭头键来回切换 forth a few frames and see that on frame 74 is when we're slicing through 几帧后，我们可以看到在第74帧时我们正在切过 So we need to change our first frame here to frame 74 and sometimes it helps to 所以我们需要将这里的第一帧更改为第74帧，有时候这样做有帮助 put it one frame before 将其放在之前的一帧 And now we can see that our particles show up the little highlighted 现在我们可以看到我们的粒子出现了一些突出的 particles there and they shoot towards the camera to give our shot even more 粒子，它们朝着摄像机射击，使我们的镜头更加 And now when we play 现在当我们播放时 we can see this particle system and simulation that's repeated 我们可以看到这个重复的粒子系统和模拟效果 every single time 每一次 And in this example 在这个例子中 you can see that we can drag our timeline and you can see all the particles 你可以看到我们可以拖动时间轴，你可以看到所有的粒子 as they go through 当它们通过时 And we can also reverse our camera at the same time 我们还可以同时反转摄像机 Now the more you reverse it 现在你反转得越多 it can get a little bit buggy 可能会有一点小问题 And that's just the way it's going to be with this system life cycle 这就是这个系统生命周期的工作方式 Our other option is adding a track for a Niagara cache 我们的另一个选择是为Niagara缓存添加一个轨道 The first thing you should do is enable the Niagara Sim Caching plugin 首先，你应该启用Niagara Sim Caching插件 there's two ways to approach this workflow 有两种方法可以处理这个工作流程 but this is the most accurate tool to cache your simulations 但这是缓存你的模拟的最准确的工具 Now just go to the first frame of your sequence and press this little 现在，只需转到你序列的第一帧，然后按下这个小 record button and Niagara will go ahead and cache this Niagara track 录制按钮，Niagara将继续缓存这个Niagara轨道 And now you'll have the same exact simulation every single time 现在，每次都会得到完全相同的模拟结果 So drag and drop these different Niagara effects into your scene from blowing 所以，从吹动的地方将这些不同的尼亚加拉效果拖放到你的场景中 dust to lightsaber impacts and explosions 从灰尘到光剑的冲击和爆炸 They're all here 它们都在这里 And all you have to do is add them into Sequencer 你只需要将它们添加到序列编辑器中 Now to get started on your own project 现在开始你自己的项目 you can navigate to the Saber Battle project file and then click on 你可以导航到光剑战斗项目文件，然后点击 ML Vanguard Clash Tutorial Start Here ML先锋冲突教程从这里开始 So otherwise just type in start here and it's the only thing that will pop 否则，只需输入“从这里开始”，它是唯一会弹出的内容 but we'll click on this level and open this up 但我们将点击这个层级并打开它 And then once you're happy with your animation 然后，一旦你对你的动画满意 you can start toggling on your effects level and start adding in dynamic 你可以开始切换到你的特效层级，并开始添加动态的 effects into your scene 效果到你的场景中 as well as adding different lights into the lighting level 还可以将不同的灯光添加到照明层级中 Now a good way to stay organized when using levels is once you have this 使用层级时保持组织的好方法是 effects layer selected 选择效果层级 I can go back into my outliner 我可以回到我的大纲视图 press on this little cog wheel here and only show actors in the current 点击这里的小齿轮图标，只显示当前的演员 Now this will only show me the effects actors in my outliner 现在，这将只显示我的大纲视图中的效果演员 and this makes it a lot easier to be organized and see what's going on inside 这样更容易组织起来，并且可以看到内部发生的事情 of this scene 这个场景 So if you look at our drone here 所以，如果你看看我们的无人机 this is set up by having two muzzle tracers parented to a flying 这是通过将两个枪口追踪器与飞行器关联起来设置的 but this will interact with the world properly 但这将正确地与世界互动 So the collisions are set up inside of this Niagara particle system so that 因此，碰撞是在这个尼亚加拉粒子系统内设置的，这样 you can move this around and it'll interact correctly and even shoot some 你可以将它移动到周围，它将正确地互动，甚至可以发射一些 lights through our scene 光线穿过我们的场景 If I jump into simulate mode 如果我切换到模拟模式 I can see these drone swarms in the background 我可以看到这些无人机群在背景中 which will circle around and spread out over time 它们会在一段时间内循环并扩散开来 The longer that this sequence goes 这个序列持续的时间越长 the further out the drones will go 无人机将越远 So once you have your life cycle set up 所以，一旦你设置好生命周期 you can use this to drag and drop different sections of these drone swarms 你可以使用它来拖放这些无人机群的不同部分 to make cool shapes in your compositions 以在你的作品中制作出酷炫的形状 And then we have a lot of ground dust that you can quickly duplicate 然后，我们有很多地面灰尘，你可以快速复制 throughout your scene and will correctly interact with all of the explosions and 在你的场景中，并且会与所有的爆炸和 different lights and impacts that our Niagara effects are creating 我们的尼亚加拉效果产生的不同的灯光和冲击相互作用 And you can see by just duplicating five or six there 你可以看到只需复制五个或六个 we get some really nice subtle atmosphere going through our scene that 我们的场景中会出现一些非常好的细微氛围 interacts when we have these explosions 当我们有这些爆炸时会相互作用 we have our saber impacts 我们有光剑的冲击效果 which are just sparks with collisions and they'll also add some dynamic 这只是带有碰撞的火花，它们还会增加一些动态的 light into the scene 光线到场景中 So take these Niagara effects and start adding them into your sequence to 所以，拿起这些尼亚加拉效果，开始将它们添加到你的序列中 create your own action scenes 创造你自己的动作场景
